title: taraxacum officinale var. laevigatum
intro: Taraxacum officinale var. laevigatum, also known as the smooth dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to stimulate liver and kidney function. The smooth dandelion has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and joint pain, due to its rich content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
